data.en: What is the weather like?
data.hint: What is... like? / ...怎么样？

data.en: It is warm and sunny.
data.hint: It is + adj and adj / It is + 形容词 + and + 形容词

data.en: The wind is blowing hard.
data.hint: present continuous / 现在进行时

data.en: Look at the lightning.
data.hint: Look at + noun / 祈使句 Look at + 名词

data.en: It is raining heavily today.
data.hint: heavily modifies raining / heavily (很大地) 修饰 raining

data.en: The center of the country is dry.
data.cn: 这个国家的中心是干燥的。
data.hint: center of / ...的中心

data.en: It is cold and snowy here.
data.hint: snowy / 下雪的

data.en: We usually stay in when it snows.
data.cn: 下雪时我们通常待在家里。
data.hint: stay in / 待在家里

data.en: The sun is shining.
data.hint: present continuous / 现在进行时

data.en: There is a huge storm today.
data.hint: There is + a + noun / There is + 单数名词

data.en: What are you doing at the beach?
data.hint: What are you doing / 你在做什么

data.en: I am sunbathing at the moment.
data.cn: 我现在正在享受日光浴。
data.hint: am + doing / am + 现在分词

data.en: He is playing beach volleyball.
data.hint: is + doing / is + 现在分词

data.en: We are building a snowman outside.
data.hint: build a snowman / 堆雪人

data.en: They are flying kites in this season.
data.cn: 他们在这个季节放风筝。
data.hint: fly kites / 放风筝

data.en: I am watering flowers in the garden.
data.hint: water flowers / 浇花

data.en: Many people are staying in today.
data.hint: stay in / 待在家里

data.en: The tourists are taking photos.
data.hint: take photos / 拍照

data.en: He is running after his hat.
data.hint: run after / 追逐

data.en: Some of them are skating.
data.cn: 他们中的一些人正在滑冰。
data.hint: Some of them / 他们中的一些(人)

data.en: The clouds look amazing.
data.hint: look + adj / look (看起来) + 形容词

data.en: It feels like a magical place.
data.cn: 感觉就像一个神奇的地方。
data.hint: feel like / 感觉像...

data.en: The trees look like a painting.
data.hint: look like + noun / look like (看起来像) + 名词

data.en: We are at a rest area now.
data.cn: 我们现在在一个休息区。
data.hint: at a rest area / 在休息区

data.en: Climbing is hard but we are making progress.
data.cn: 爬山很辛苦，但我们正在取得进展。
data.hint: make progress / 取得进展

data.en: My shoes are wet and dirty.
data.hint: are + adj and adj / are + 形容词 + and + 形容词

data.en: Many people are still in high spirits.
data.hint: in high spirits / 情绪高涨

data.en: They do not seem tired at all.
data.hint: not... at all / 一点也不...

data.en: The ground is very wet.
data.hint: ground / 地面

data.en: It feels good to be at the top.
data.hint: It feels good + to verb / 做...感觉真好

data.en: In my hometown the sun rises at six.
data.cn: 在我的家乡，太阳六点升起。
data.hint: simple present for facts / 一般现在时表示事实
accept: The sun rises at six in my hometown.

data.en: But it is rising right now.
data.hint: present continuous for now / 现在进行时表示此时此刻

data.en: She always wears a sweater.
data.hint: always + simple present / always + 一般现在时

data.en: It rains quite often here.
data.hint: quite often / 经常

data.en: Do you have an umbrella?
data.hint: Do you have / 你有...吗？

data.en: It does not snow here usually.
data.hint: does not snow / 不下雪

data.en: What is your family doing?
data.hint: Family as singular group / Family 作为一个整体(单数)

data.en: I am looking out of the window.
data.hint: look out of / 看着...的外面

data.en: Come and visit us some day.
data.hint: some day / 改天

data.en: Once the weather turns warm.
data.hint: turn + adj / turn (变得) + 形容词

data.en: How does weather affect our lives?
data.cn: 天气如何影响我们的生活？
data.hint: affect / 影响

data.en: It affects what we wear.
data.hint: what we wear / 我们穿什么

data.en: We are under the weather.
data.hint: under the weather / 身体不舒服 (习语)

data.en: I am feeling stressed and busy.
data.cn: 我感到压力很大而且很忙。
data.hint: feel + adj / feel + 形容词

data.en: Sunlight helps our body to produce vitamins.
data.cn: 阳光帮助我们的身体产生维生素。
data.hint: help + noun + to do / 帮助某人做某事

data.en: This can improve our mood.
data.cn: 这可以改善我们的情绪。
data.hint: improve / 改善，提高

data.en: Some people may get angry easily.
data.hint: get angry / 生气

data.en: It is important to go outside.
data.hint: It is important to... / 做...很重要

data.en: People feel unusually sad in winter.
data.cn: 人们在冬天感到异常悲伤。
data.hint: unusually / 异常地，不同寻常地

data.en: Rain or shine enjoy your day.
data.cn: 无论是雨是晴，享受你的一天。
data.hint: Rain or shine / 无论是雨是晴 (习语)
accept: Enjoy your day rain or shine.
